title: CBDT directs AIS to show foreign investments, strengthening tax transparency and compliance
summary: CBDT will upload foreign investment and overseas financial account information into taxpayers' AIS within 90 days under the AEOI framework. The move aims to improve tax transparency, simplify compliance, strengthen verification of foreign assets and encourage accurate income tax return filing.

title: 8th Pay Commission: Should the highest government salary be capped? Here's what employee bodies want
summary: Employee bodies have proposed contrasting approaches to determining the highest salary under the 8th Pay Commission, with some seeking a 1:12 cap between minimum and maximum pay while others oppose any such limit.

title: 20x rule explained: Simple property price test to decide if renting or buying a home is smarter
summary: The 20x rule helps homebuyers compare property prices to rental values before deciding whether to buy or rent. Here's how the price‑to‑rent ratio works, its benefits and limitations and how EMIs, appreciation and personal finances shape smarter housing choices.

title: Think choosing a bad fund is your biggest mistake? These 3 can cost even more
summary: The biggest threat to your mutual fund returns may not be the fund you choose, but the decisions you make after investing. Experts identify three costly mistakes that investors should avoid.

title: Switched jobs recently? EPFO's new rule can make your PF transfer hassle-free
summary: EPFO has removed the need for a separate provident fund transfer request when employees with Aadhaar-linked UANs change jobs. The move is part of a wider overhaul of the EPFO's digital platform aimed at making PF services faster and simpler.

title: Ask the right questions before you borrow: CRIF's Sachin Seth
summary: CRIF India's Sachin Seth discusses how India's credit ecosystem has matured through Jan Dhan, Aadhaar and digital lending infrastructure, and why risk-based pricing and secured credit products like gold loans are gaining traction.&nbsp;

title: Nithin Kamath explains difference between ‘direct’ and ‘regular’ mutual funds, urges investors to review plans
summary: Zerodha co-founder Nithin Kamath has asked investors to understand the difference between ‘direct’ and ‘regular’ mutual fund plans. He said many investors remain unaware of the higher costs associated with regular plans and advised reviewing their portfolios to identify their existing investments.

title: 8th Pay Commission: Railway engineers seek pay parity, Group B status and better career growth opportunities
summary: Railway engineers have urged the 8th Pay Commission to restore pay parity, grant Group B status and improve promotions. Their demands, raised during stakeholder consultations, could shape future salary, pension and allowance reforms for 1.1 crore Central government employees and pensioners.

title: Indian Bank Q1 Results: Standalone net profit rises 10% YoY to Rs 3,273 crore; shares zoom 10%
summary: Indian Bank reported a standalone net profit of Rs 3,273 crore for Q1 FY27, up more than 10% year-on-year, while net interest income rose nearly 17%. The PSU lender also posted improved asset quality and higher advances, prompting its shares to surge around 10% after the earnings announcement.

summary: The National Stock Exchange (NSE) reported record activity in its crude oil options contract on July 9, 2026, with the highest-ever daily premium turnover of Rs 2,006.49 crore, trading volume of 47,33,862 contracts, and intraday open interest exceeding 1,14,000 contracts. title: Why Costco stock tumbled over 4% despite strong June sales
summary: Costco reported strong June sales growth of 10.6% year over year. This growth, however, marked a slowdown from the previous month's pace. Investors reacted negatively to signs of moderating sales momentum. The company's premium valuation amplified the market's sharp reaction to the news.

title: Global Market | Tencent explores stake in AI Startup Manus after China challenges Meta deal: Reports
summary: Tencent is in talks to become the largest shareholder in AI startup Manus as investors seek to buy back the company from Meta after Chinese regulators ordered the US tech giant to unwind its $2 billion acquisition. The proposed deal would reshape Manus' ownership amid heightened regulatory scrutiny

title: Bharti Airtel fixes record date for its highest-ever dividend of Rs 24/share. What’s the last date to buy?
summary: Bharti Airtel has fixed July 24 as the record date for its highest-ever annual dividend of Rs 24 per share for FY26, making July 23 the last date to buy the stock for eligibility. The announcement comes as brokerages remain bullish on the telecom major's long-term growth and cash flow prospects.
